titleStmt.title: SII 15.35: original edition by P. B. Desai, Dines Chandra Sircar and G. S. Gai
No. 35. (B.K. No. 100 of 1929-30.) MUTTAGI, BAGEVADI TALUK, BIJAPUR DISTRICT.

summary.p: On a slab standing in the village chāvaḍi.
This is dated the 10th regnal year of the king Prabhava, Kārttika śu. 12, Monday. Except for the weekday which was Thursday on the said tithi, the other details correspond to 1147 A.D., November 6.

It registers a sarvanamasya grant of the village Maṇiyūr in Hebbālu Twelve, made by the king at the request of Sōviseṭṭi and Paṭṭasāhaṇi Hiriya-daṇḍanāyaka Brahmadēvayya to the temple of Dakshiṇāmukha Chennakēśava of the agrahāra Muttage, situated in Muttage Thirty in Tarddavāḍi Thousand. The temple was built by Kaihiseṭṭi, the grandfather of Sōviseṭṭi. The epigraph describes the genealogy of the Chālukya family and states that Sōviseṭṭi always carried on trade in jewels with the Chālukya king and his officer Brahma-daṇḍādhipa.

After this record there is an inscription of the Kalachuri ruler Rāya-Murāri Sōvidēva, engraved on the same stone. This is followed by another epigraph of the reign of Jagadēkamalla II citing identical details of the above date. It commences with a description of the Seḷaṟa (i.e. Śilāhāra) feudatory family and registers a gift of the manneya-vaṇa of the said village of Maṇiyūr to the same deity by Ḍākarasa, Gōṇarasa and other members of the Seḷaṟa family in the presence of the king.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© jayatyāviṣkṛtaṁ viṣṇōrvvārāhaṁ kṣōbhitārṇnavaṁ dakṣiṇōṁnatadaṁṣṭrāgra viśrāṁtabhuvanaṁ vapuḥ . śrīramyōṁnaṁmravakṣasthaḷanakhiḷa
pāvanaṁ pāvanaṁ kēyūrādyanaṁtaratnābharaṇaparivṛtaṁ svaṁbaraṁ svaṁbaraṁ daṁṣṭrōru ttuṁgāgradiṁdattidanivanaṁ
bā varāhaṁ varāha kāraṁ śrī kēśavaṁ rakṣisuge vasudheyaṁ vāsudēvaṁ sudēvaṁ .
© Ādivarāhaṁ balida mahādaṁṣṭrāgrapradēśadaṁdettida saptōdadhivastrāvēṣṭiṭha mēdiniya kirīṭadaṁte maṁdaravesaguṁ . Antasevvamaṁdarācaḷa
dinteṁkaṇadasaya lasitabhāratavarṣābhyantaradoḷoppi tōrppudanantapuragrāmapaṁkti kuntaḷa dēśaṁ . kuntaḷadēśamaṁ samaradhāri
ṇiyalliya rāṣṭrakūṭabha�kāntaranellaraṁ nijabhujābaḷadiṁdave kādi geldukoṁ dantapana pratāpanavadhīritavairiba
lāvaśēṣanaśrāntasuvarṇnadāni sunṛpaṁ kali tailapanājilōlupaṁ . ka . tailapadēvane tanayaṁ cāḷukyakuḷapraśastivistārakanā
māḷaṁkritaṁ prajāvanaśīlaṁ satyāśrayaṁ nṛpēśvaranādaṁ . satyāśrayadēvana maganatyaṁta viḷāsi vikramādityaviḷāstutyaṁ nṛpanādanātana nityōdaya
sahajanayyaṇaṁ nṛpanādaṁ . Ayyaṇadēvana tammanajayyaṁ sarvvōrvvigellavarasādaṁ muṁgayya baladiṁdamamitākṣayya
yaśaṁ garuḍaraṁhanā jayasiṁhaṁ . jayasiṁhamahīpatiya priyaputraṁ dhātrigellamīśvara nādaṁ bhayamuṁ lōbhamumillada nayavantaṁ prajege nalla
nāhavamallaṁ . Āhavamallamahīśana dēhabhavaṁ sakaḷa bhūmigadhipatiyādaṁ sāhasaparākramaṁ sakaḷāhitanripadarppadaḷananuttamasōmaṁ . sōmanarēṁdrana
tammaṁ sāmartthyōdvrittabhūribhujabaḷadiṁdaṁ bhūmipatiyādanāhavabhīmaṁ permmāḍi rāyanārggavajēyaṁ . permmāḍirāyanaṇugina hemmaganaidaṁ yugīna nṛpasa
rvvajñaṁ nirmmaḷanabhinavakāmaṁ dharmmātmaṁ sārbbabhaumanādaṁ sōmaṁ . sōmēśvara dēvana maganī mēdinigallavarasanādaṁ śauryyōddāmaṁ caḷukyanṛpa cūḍāmaṇi jagadēka
mallanīyale ballaṁ . v® . cōḷaṁ cāḷādanaṁdhraṁ śaranikaraśritōraḥśirōraṁdhranādaṁ gauḷaṁ gōḷiṭṭanaṁgaṁ hritabalasarvvāṁganādaṁ karaṁ nēpāḷaṁ pāḷāgi pōdaṁ nijajanapa
dradiṁ gurjjaraṁ lajjegaṭṭaṁ kālāḷoḷkādi sōlteṁdaḍe nararaḷave śrīpratāpakṣamāpa . kaṁ . jagadēkamallanṛpapadayugaḷāṁbhōjōpajīvi maneverggaḍe sarvvaguṇanidhi paṭṭasā
haṇi vigatabhayaṁ barmmadēvadaṁḍādhīśaṁ . v® . janakellaṁ kanakāṁnavaṁ navasuvastrakṣētra maṁ koṭṭu munnina karṇna� nālvaḍiyenalmādāniyādaṁ caḷukya
narādhīśvara pūjyarājya padabhārādhāradōrddaṁḍanāḷdanamādyat karipaṭṭasāhaṇi suvipraṁ brahmadaṁḍādhipaṁ . ka . Ā paṭṭasāhaṇagamurvvīpatigaṁ sarvva
ratnasaṁvṛddhiyanoldā hottuṁ māḍuva suvyāpāraṁ sōviseṭṭi nagaḷdaṁ jagadoḷ Ā negaḷda sōviseṭṭiya mānōṁnativetta tāyataṁdeya vikhyātānūnavenipa
kulasaṁtānada satkīrtti tānadaṁtenalellaṁ . Ādibrahmana toḍeyiṁdāda śvētakuḷa vaiśya roḷvikhyātaṁ mādāni bammiseṭṭi taḷōdari dēlikavvegoldu vallabhanādaṁ .
varamūrtti barmmiseṭṭiyu varuṇādhara dēlikavveyuṁ paḍedarssusthiranenipa nāciseṭṭiya nurudharmmada ceṭṭiseṭṭiyaṁ mudadiṁdaṁ . Ā nāciseṭṭi tanna
strī nācavve verasacyutāṁghridvayamaṁ nānābratadiṁdarccini dāniyanā kaihiseṭṭiyaṁ paḍedaravar . v® . niyatācāradanacyutāṁghriyugamaṁ kāmavveyuṁ kai
hiseṭṭiyumārādhisi puṇyadiṁde paḍedarddīrghāyuvaṁ cauḍiseṭṭiyanatyuttamakīrtti mūrttiyutanaṁ nācaṇṇanaṁ mādiseṭṭiyanī mūvaranaṁbujāsanaharī
śaprattaraṁ putraraṁ . kaṁ . Ā vinuta ceṭṭaseṭṭi ramāvallabhanaṁ vadhuvarasavveverasu sadbhā vade pūjisi paḍedaṁ śrīvantananeseva sōviseṭṭiyanolaviṁ .
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrī pṛthvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvaraṁ parama baṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrī pratāpacakravartti
jagadēkamalladēvaṁ kalyāṇada nelavīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁgeyuttirddu svasti śrīvacchāḷukyacakravartti pratāpa jagadēkamalladēvavarṣada hattana
ya prabhavasaṁvatsarada kārttika śuddadvā śi sōmavāradaṁdu sōviseṭṭiya biṁnapadiṁ paṭa sāhaṇa hiṁyadaṁḍanāyakaṁ brahmadēvayyanuṁ binnapaṁ gayye taddavā
ḍisāyi dabaḷiya bāḍaṁmūvataṁ modalabāḍaṁ sarbbanamasyaduttamadagrahāraṁ mutta geya naḍuve kaihiseṭṭi pratiṣṭhayaṁ māḍida dakṣiṇāmukha śrī
caṁnakēśavadēvargge hebbāḷuhaṁnneraḍaroḷagaṇa maṇiyūraṁ sarbbanamasyaṁ māḍi tribhō gābhēṁtera siddhiya gedha rāpūrvvakaṁ koṭṭaṁ . śrī caṁnakēśavadēvāya namaḥ .
śrī mitrēṁdugaḷuḷḷinavī mēdinigoḍeyanādanugra śiḷāhārāmita tapadiṁdorbbaṁ bhīmabaḷaṁ seḷaraneṁba hesaresavarasaṁ . seḷaṟa�sānvayadarasarppalakālaṁ sakalaBetween lines 28 and 45 is ṇo. 115 below.
cakravarttigaḷādarbbaḷikave manneyarādarssale kelarī taddavāḍisāyirakellaṁ . svastisamadhi gata paṁcamahāśabdaṁ vaṁdijanakanakābdaṁ mahāmaṁḍaḷēśvaraṁ kūpaṇapu
ravarādhīśvaraṁ . suvarṇnagaruḍadhvajaṁ . vijayalakṣmīsaṁśritadakṣaṇabhujaṁ . jīmūtavāha nānvayaprasūtaṁ . sauryyaraghujātaṁ . seḷaṟa kuḷakamaḷamārttaṁ
ḍaṁ . kadanapracaṁḍaṁ . kātyāyanīlabdhavaraprasādaṁ . sahajāmōdaṁ . manneyavallabhaṁ bhayalōbhamarllabhaṁ . viṣamahayārūḍha srauḍharēvantaṁ . vairakritāṁtaṁ . nāmā
disamastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmat ḍākarasanuṁ gōṇarasanuṁ Ammarasanuṁ . Āhumallarasa nuvintivarumukhyavāgi samastasaṁtānaru śrīmat jagadēkamalladēvara saṁnidhāna dalu
hebbāḷu hanneraḍaṟoḷagaṇa maṇiyūra manneya vaṇavaṁ hattaneya prabhava saṁvatsarada kārttika śuddha dvādaśi sōmavāradalu muttageya naḍuvaṇa dakṣiṇāmukhada śrīcaṁnakēśa
vadēvargge dhārāpūrbbakaṁ koṭṭaru .
Digital edition of SII 15.35 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
